packages.name: Schedule Command

packages.description: Pull application updates from the configured git remote.
packages.name: Update Command

packages.description: Bundle of bundles: a complete instance — starter (frontend, LLM, core tools, memory) + all-parsers (every file parser, Whisper, OCR) + indexing-search (full ingest & retrieval).
packages.name: Full

packages.description: Bundle: Gmail integration — service plus check/send/mark-read/modify-labels tools.
packages.name: Gmail

packages.description: OAuth token storage and provider helper for MCP servers.

packages.name: Search Result Helper

packages.description: Bundle: full ingestion + retrieval — extract/chunk/embed/lexical-index tasks, OCR/transcribe/textualize tasks, embed & OCR & whisper services, and hybrid/lexical/semantic search tools.
packages.name: Indexing & Search

packages.description: Bundle: Model Context Protocol support — the /mcp command, MCP service, and OAuth helper.
packages.name: MCP

packages.description: Audio waveform loading via soundfile/librosa with ffprobe metadata.
packages.name: Audio Parser

packages.description: Archive and email extraction — ZIP/TAR/GZ/BZ2/EML (stdlib), 7Z/RAR (py7zr/rarfile when present) — bundled with the extract_container task that feeds extracted child files back into the pipeline.
packages.name: Container Parser

packages.description: Google Docs (.gdoc) shortcut parsing — fetches document text via the google_drive service.
packages.name: Google Docs Parser

packages.description: Microsoft Office extraction — Word (.docx/.doc) and PowerPoint (.pptx) text and embedded images via python-docx and python-pptx.
packages.name: Office Parser

packages.description: PDF text, image, and table extraction via PyMuPDF (fitz).
packages.name: PDF Parser

packages.description: Tabular parsing — CSV/TSV, Excel, Parquet/Feather, SQLite, and Google Sheets — into pandas DataFrames.
packages.name: Tabular Parser

packages.description: Video container parsing and audio-track extraction via PyAV (av).
packages.name: Video Parser

packages.description: Bundle: plan-first workflow — the /plan command, plan-mode service, and propose_plan tool.
packages.name: Plan Mode

packages.description: Bundle: scheduled background agents — the /schedule command, spawn-subagent task, and schedule-subagent tool.
packages.name: Scheduling

packages.description: Google Drive OAuth service (registered as 'google_drive'); backs .gdoc and .gsheet parsing.
packages.name: Google Drive Service

packages.description: Text and image embedding services for indexed search.
packages.name: Embedding Services

packages.description: Gmail API service for email tools.

packages.description: LiteLLM LLM backend discovered by the LLM router.
packages.name: LiteLLM Backend

packages.description: Connect to MCP servers and register their tools.
packages.name: MCP Service

packages.description: Image-to-text OCR. Cross-platform install (pillow-heif for HEIC); the OCR engine itself is your choice and is loaded lazily per platform — Windows OCR (winrt), macOS Vision (pyobjc), or easyocr+torch. If no engine is installed, the service raises a clear message telling you what to pip install.
packages.name: OCR Service

packages.description: Runtime hooks for session-scoped plan mode.
packages.name: Plan Mode Service

packages.description: Web search provider service.
packages.name: Web Search Service

packages.description: Speech transcription service backed by Faster Whisper.
packages.name: Whisper Service

packages.description: Bundle: a complete basic setup covering ~95% of everyday use — Telegram frontend, LiteLLM backend (most models), read/edit files, sql & shell tools, ask-user-question, plugin authoring (test_plugin), plus dream-memory and auto conversation titles.
packages.name: Starter
